languages.text: "У каждого слова есть своя цена. Если я произнесу то, что он хочет, то это будет капитуляцией перед ксеносом, отречением от веры в Омниссию и моих принципов. Я продам свое достоинство и свою душу. Лучше погибнуть".

"Every word carries a cost. To say what he demands would be to surrender to the xenos, a betrayal of the Omnissiah and everything I stand for. It would mean selling my dignity and my very soul. I would rather perish."
languages.original_text: "У каждого слова есть своя цена. Если я произнесу то, что он хочет, то это будет капитуляцией перед ксеносом, отречением от веры в Омниссию и моих принципов. Я продам свое достоинство и свою душу. Лучше погибнуть".

traits.locale_text: "Every word carries a cost. To say what he demands would be to surrender to the xenos, a betrayal of the Omnissiah and everything I stand for. It would mean selling my dignity and my very soul. I would rather perish."

"Every word carries a cost. To say what he demands would be to surrender to the xenos, a betrayal of my faith and everything I stand for. It would mean selling my dignity and my very soul. I would rather perish."

"Every word carries a cost. To say what he demands would be to surrender to the xenos, a betrayal of the Omnissiah and everything I stand for. It would mean selling my dignity and my very soul. I would rather perish."

languages.text: "Jedes Wort hat einen Preis. Zu sagen, was er verlangt, hieße, sich dem Xenos zu ergeben, und das wäre Verrat am Omnissiah und an allem, wofür ich stehe. Das würde bedeuten, meine Würde und meine Seele zu verkaufen. Lieber sterbe ich."
languages.original_text: "Every word carries a cost. To say what he demands would be to surrender to the xenos, a betrayal of the Omnissiah and everything I stand for. It would mean selling my dignity and my very soul. I would rather perish."

traits.locale_text: "Jedes Wort hat einen Preis. Zu sagen, was er verlangt, hieße, sich dem Xenos zu ergeben, und das wäre Verrat am Omnissiah und an allem, wofür ich stehe. Das würde bedeuten, meine Würde und meine Seele zu verkaufen. Lieber sterbe ich."

languages.text: « Chaque parole a un coût. Accepter de prononcer tout ceci signifierait que je m'incline face à lui et que je suis disposé à trahir l'Omnimessie et toutes mes valeurs. Que je suis prêt à marchander ma dignité et mon âme. Plutôt mourir. »
languages.original_text: "Every word carries a cost. To say what he demands would be to surrender to the xenos, a betrayal of the Omnissiah and everything I stand for. It would mean selling my dignity and my very soul. I would rather perish."

traits.locale_text: « Chaque parole a un coût. Accepter de prononcer tout ceci signifierait que je m'incline face à lui et que je suis disposé à trahir l'Omnimessie et toutes mes valeurs. Que je suis prêt à marchander ma dignité et mon âme. Plutôt mourir. »

languages.text: «Cada palabra tiene su precio. Decir lo que exige sería rendirme a un xenos, traicionar al Omnissiah y todo lo que represento. Sería vender mi dignidad y mi propia alma. Preferiría morir».
languages.original_text: "Every word carries a cost. To say what he demands would be to surrender to the xenos, a betrayal of the Omnissiah and everything I stand for. It would mean selling my dignity and my very soul. I would rather perish."

traits.locale_text: «Cada palabra tiene su precio. Decir lo que exige sería rendirme a un xenos, traicionar al Omnissiah y todo lo que represento. Sería vender mi dignidad y mi propia alma. Preferiría morir».

languages.text: "Her kelimenin bir bedeli vardır. Onun talep ettiği şeyi söylemek; zenoya teslim olmak, Hermesih'e ve savunduğum her şeye ihanet etmek olur. Bu, onurumu ve ruhumu satmak anlamına gelir. Ölmeyi yeğlerim."
languages.original_text: "Every word carries a cost. To say what he demands would be to surrender to the xenos, a betrayal of the Omnissiah and everything I stand for. It would mean selling my dignity and my very soul. I would rather perish."

traits.locale_text: "Her kelimenin bir bedeli vardır. Onun talep ettiği şeyi söylemek; zenoya teslim olmak, Hermesih'e ve savunduğum her şeye ihanet etmek olur. Bu, onurumu ve ruhumu satmak anlamına gelir. Ölmeyi yeğlerim."

languages.text: “每个字都有其分量。说出他要求的话，就是向异形屈服，就是在背叛欧姆尼赛亚以及我所信奉的一切。这对我来说便是出卖尊严，出卖灵魂。我宁可一死。”
languages.original_text: "Every word carries a cost. To say what he demands would be to surrender to the xenos, a betrayal of the Omnissiah and everything I stand for. It would mean selling my dignity and my very soul. I would rather perish."

traits.locale_text: “每个字都有其分量。说出他要求的话，就是向异形屈服，就是在背叛欧姆尼赛亚以及我所信奉的一切。这对我来说便是出卖尊严，出卖灵魂。我宁可一死。”

languages.text: 「言葉の一つひとつには代償が伴います。彼の要求する言葉を口にすることは、異種族に屈することであり、オムニッシアと、私が拠って立つすべてへの裏切りです。それは、私の尊厳と、ほかならぬ私の魂を売り渡すことを意味します。それくらいなら、私は滅んだほうがましです」
languages.original_text: "Every word carries a cost. To say what he demands would be to surrender to the xenos, a betrayal of the Omnissiah and everything I stand for. It would mean selling my dignity and my very soul. I would rather perish."

traits.locale_text: 「言葉の一つひとつには代償が伴います。彼の要求する言葉を口にすることは、異種族に屈することであり、オムニッシアと、私が拠って立つすべてへの裏切りです。それは、私の尊厳と、ほかならぬ私の魂を売り渡すことを意味します。それくらいなら、私は滅んだほうがましです」
